ogTitle: Chapple Vale vs Charlemont: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chapple Vale and Charlemont.
heading: Chapple Vale vs Charlemont — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chapple Vale, Victoria and Charlemont, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chapple Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Charlemont (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chapple Vale or Charlemont safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chapple Vale has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Charlemont scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chapple Vale scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Charlemont scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chapple Vale or Charlemont?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chapple Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
